response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling
Experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of hardware-software co-design or system-level performance analysis
